text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #19)

I took my sweet time because I wanted to be very sure, so I turned off ccache and everything and tried various combinations. Went back to Samba 4.19.5 available in ports. Here's the .log with the gnutls.keydbg.patch applied, and pthreadpool patch to Samba *not* applied.

https://pastebin.com/uVesLqjn
